arts.ttl: I played for Chelsea and Tottenham - only one made me feel like the king of the world - football.london
arts.sum: Now, ahead of Chelsea's clash with Tottenham on Sunday, Gallas has revealed he believes Enzo Maresca's men will be a huge threat to other teams in the Premier League title race next season. The former defender joined Chelsea in 2001 before spending four years at Arsenal and ending his time in England with Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'closely monitoring' Brazilian teenager amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Arsenal's trip to Craven Cottage will see the team face off against former team-mate Emile Smith Rowe, who has become a key player under new boss Marco Silva this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Chelsea - Premier League
arts.sum: How Tottenham could line up for their Premier League clash with Chelsea on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham host rivals Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Tottenham are brilliant against the big boys, but meek against the minnows - five reasons why Spurs are so consistently inconsistent, writes JAMES SHARPE
arts.sum: THE SHARPE END: Trying to make sense of Tottenham is, and always has been, an impossible task. Why can Tottenham beat the big clubs but get turned over by those they should beat?

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Chelsea: Best bets for all Sunday’s Premier League games
arts.sum: Our betting expert with punts for both the day’s London derbies, with Arsenal's trip to Fulham, Brighton at Leicester and Ipswich-Bournemouth PLUS a La Liga shout

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists Chelsea aren't favourites for London derby against Tottenham as the manager continues to play down the Blues' chances this season
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's team find themselves in a tough moment, two weeks on from their 4-0 beating of Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca sends Chelsea squad warning after making example of Noni Madueke
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs CHELSEA: Enzo Maresca wants to get the best out of every Chelsea player at his disposal and insists his tough love will continue throughout the season as he bids to fire the big-spending Blues to success

arts.ttl: The Big Question: Are Chelsea genuine title contenders?
arts.sum: With Chelsea sitting in second place ahead of Sunday's London derby at Tottenham Hotspur, football writer Ben Bloom looks at whether they can push for the Premier League title. Unbeaten in their last six Premier League games and winning their most recent three with an aggregate score of 10-2, Chelsea have climbed above Arsenal and Man City into second place.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams Man United for 'being outrun every single week' and reveals the lesson they could learn from Chelsea as Rio Ferdinand brands defeat to Nottingham Forest a 'shambles'
arts.sum: Gary Neville has criticised Manchester United for 'being outrun every single week'. Ruben Amorim's side suffered a second successive defeat as they were beaten 3-2 at home to Nottingham Forest.
